neighborhoods.name: Centre Historique (Vannes)
neighborhoods.description: Medieval walled city center with half-timbered houses, cobblestone streets, and a vibrant market scene along the port
neighborhoods.character: Urban historic, walkable, culturally rich with maritime charm

housing.predominantType: Renovated apartments in historic stone and half-timbered buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: Wednesday and Saturday markets on Place des Lices. Walking distance to the Gulf of Morbihan.

neighborhoods.name: Intra-Muros (Saint-Malo)
neighborhoods.description: The walled old city of Saint-Malo, fully rebuilt after WWII, surrounded by ramparts with ocean views
neighborhoods.character: Compact, tourist-heavy in summer, dramatic coastal setting

housing.predominantType: Apartments in granite buildings within the walled city

neighborhoods.character_notes: Very seasonal — quiet winters, packed summers. Parking is extremely limited. Best for those who love the sea.

neighborhoods.name: Conleau (Vannes)
neighborhoods.description: Residential peninsula south of Vannes center, facing the Gulf of Morbihan with beaches and waterfront promenades

housing.predominantType: Houses and low-rise apartments with garden access

neighborhoods.character_notes: Popular with retirees already. Thalassotherapy center nearby. 15-minute walk to Vannes center.

neighborhoods.name: Dinard Centre
neighborhoods.description: Belle Epoque seaside resort town across the Rance estuary from Saint-Malo, known for elegant villas and calm beaches
neighborhoods.character: Upscale coastal resort, quieter than Saint-Malo, genteel atmosphere

housing.predominantType: Apartments in Belle Epoque villas and modern residences

neighborhoods.character_notes: Historically popular with British expats. Film festival in autumn. Ferry to Saint-Malo takes 10 minutes.

neighborhoods.name: Centre-Ville (Quimper)
neighborhoods.description: Charming cathedral city at the confluence of two rivers, capital of traditional Breton culture with excellent markets

housing.predominantType: Apartments in historic center and houses in surrounding areas

neighborhoods.character_notes: Most affordable city in the Brittany selection. Famous Faience pottery tradition. Festival de Cornouaille in July.
